# Folded/collapsed stacks — sampled CPU profile of a Node.js HTTP request.
# Format: semicolon-separated frames (leaf last), whitespace, then self samples.
server.emit('request') 2
server.emit('request');app.handle 4
server.emit('request');app.handle;router.handle 6
